entry.title: Re: May Developer Challenge - SAP AI Services - Week 2
entry.content: Here is my submission.

entry.title: Re: Can't we multiply decimal numbers in SAP ABAP?
entry.content: Very bad solution. Don't divide by 10, 100, etc. It's done automatically by ABAP language with CURRENCY word. Search the forum and read the ABAP documentation.

entry.title: Re: Can't we multiply decimal numbers in SAP ABAP?
entry.content: Float but DECFLOAT16 or 34, not F, to avoid rounding problems.

entry.title: Re: BEx Explorer(Analyzer) can't start in win 10
entry.content: Hi Eduardo,

entry.title: Re: BEx Explorer(Analyzer) can't start in win 10
entry.content: I see my Microsoft Excel is 2019 32 bit

entry.title: Re: CPQ Tenant New URL
entry.content:
Hi,

In addition to the answers, kindly be noted that the standard DB table tenant_environments relates the admin UI of Deployment Setup. Make sure the connection info is maintained before you use that table in your scripting.

entry.content: I have checked it and tried it , its not solved yet

entry.title: Reg the Routing Transfer to DMC
entry.content:
Hi,

Greetings,

I am trying to simulate "Order POD" for the Discrete and one of the Pre-Requisite is to "

  • In Manage Routings/Recipes app, Relaxed Flow flag is set to "YES" for the Master Routing"

when i check the routing, i am getting only order based routing in my DMC system . The production order are getting integrated but routing is not there.

Any reason  for not getting integrated or solution to integrate the routings from SAP S4 hana to DMC

Br,

DSK

SAP Digital Manufacturing  @ManoelCosta

entry.title: Re: Executing Discrete Production Orders in Order POD within SAP Digital Manufacturing
entry.content:
Hi,

In my system only order level routing is getting generated any suggestion how to transfer the routing from SAP s4 hana to the DMC system.

br,

dsk

entry.title: Cost Component Structure Determination
entry.content:
Hi Everyone I activate actual cost component split in system, and I created a new CCS like below

it is specific for one company code, and in this company ZXXX, there is only one Plant ZXXX attached to

and the ZXXX CCS is activated already

But when I extend a new material accounting view and save it, system is looking for CCS Y1 not Z3 CCS

could anyone give me some clue or guidance, why it is not directing to Z3 CCS? and configuration missing?

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Dear @David_Chaviano,

 I am a SAP FICO Consultant from Vietnam. I've been working in SAP FICO for more than 2 years now. I identified as a person for this certification because I am a women, first generation college graduate in my family, People in remote or underserved locations that may be not have access to the same economic opportunities as their urban or more privileged counterparts, 

I really love working with SAP because it helps businesses improve their processes. It's amazing to see how technology can make such a big difference. I want to keep learning and growing in this field to have a great career.

I'm eager to take a free certification attempt because I believe it will help me learn more and become even better at what I do. I know that the world of technology is always changing, and I want to stay up-to-date with the latest advancements.I am grateful for this opportunity and excited about the possibilities ahead. Thank you for considering my application for the free certification attempt.

Thanks & Regards,

entry.content:
Hello,

I want to access to Kyma Dashboard from BTP Cockpit, Does anybody know why I don't access directly to kyma dashboard and the system requires my user and password again?

Sometimes changing my pasword using the forgot password link I can access but it only works once.

Thanks.

Best regards

How will it benefit the developers to call an custom app up and running on BTP platform?
What are the possible extensibility can be done using this button?
Please provide some insight on it.

Regards,

Guywholovecoding

entry.title: Enable username in Employee Central (Active Directory/SuccessFactors)
entry.content:
Hi members, 

In my company, we have the AD to SF integration enabled. Username in UDF is connected to username in AD.
We want the username to be visible on the employee profile, meaning that we want username to be visible in EC, not in EP/from the UDF. How can we achieve this? I've previously noticed that other companies have a custom field for username under BioInfo, but I am not sure how they have connected this to AD. 

All help much appreciated.

entry.title: Service broker destination-service-broker failed
entry.content:
Hello All,

I developed a UI5 application on top of CAPM service. I did deploy these changes onto Dev and QA and the deployment ran just fine but having issues with the below error on Production. We are using Jenkins pipelines to deploy the changes. I have run the production pipeline several times but facing the same error as below:

Updating service "<app_destination_name>" failed: Service broker error: Service broker destination-service-broker failed with: Failed to update the destination service instance with the user provided configuration.

For your information, I am creating destinations manually on BTP rather than including them on the mta.yaml file. I don't see an issue with destination since the application works on QA as expected. Please suggest some actions that I can take.

#CloudFoundry

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Cloud ABAP开发案例之六：BOM批量读取
entry.content:
你好老师，在参考你的方法写Class遇到了以下问题

看你定义了z_bom_dispaly，但显示未找到，想请问下这个表是如何定义的

entry.title: Re: ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022 Available Now
entry.content:
Cool, the same happened to me at last weekend.

Before noon was ok, but afternoon the same issue like You.

Instance running but unable to connect. I checked the host file as well, and put localhost in SAP GUI ( Version 8.00 with Patch 7 ) as server to try, but did not help.

Only restarting the instance solved the issue. 

Lenovo ThinkPad P Series Environment:

  • Win 11 Pro Workstation
  • Docker Containers, Images and Swap file configured to run on the Dev Drive
  • Latest Docker Windows 4.29.0
  • Windows Defender/Firewall

Nothing special was seen in the console output.

🙂

entry.title: Re: Business Role Group assignment to Business User
entry.content: comment moved to answer section

entry.title: Re: How to share tables across different CAP projects
entry.content:
Hi MioYasutake,

Thank you for your excellent article.

Regarding scenario 4,

I have requirement like this: 

I have 2 dev spaces, one is dev, and one is test. When deploying app to the test space, I want to use the hdi-container from the dev space instead of creating a new one in the test space.

I have followed the instructions, however I am encountering the error shown below:

Error: Database error 7: feature not supported: grantor and grantee are identical [8201003]
Error: Granting schema roles in the container "CAPM_PROJECT_SCHEMA" and the parameters "[]"... failed [8214221] 
 Error: Error executing: CALL "CAPM_PROJECT_SCHEMA#DI".GRANT_CONTAINER_SCHEMA_ROLES(#CONTAINER_ROLES, #CONTAINER_ROLES_PARAMETERS, ?, ?, ?); (STDERR, APP/TASK/deploy)#

I have consulted SAP Note 2589634 but it still hasn't worked.

In dev: 

In test:

Please assist me with this.

Thank you very much.

entry.title: Re: Business Role Group assignment to Business User
entry.content:
Hello,

I ran into the same task to assign multiple business users to multiple roles, maintained related business user and business role groups, then missed the related assignment features and searched for information, like provided in this post, see also comments by Birgit and Tayane.

Whilst a direct assignment is not supported - I assume because of lifecycle issues (how to deal with changes to groups and at the same time stay in full control of authorizations) - the task can be eased by using app "Maintain Business Roles":

  • filter by using the business role group defined (you may have to add this filter)
  • select all hits
  • trigger action "Mass Change" and there "Add Business Users"
  • filter by using the business user group defined (you may have to add this filter)
  • select all hits and press 'OK'
  • "Review" the assignments and then "Submit"

In the end, that served the purpose for me.
Best, Rupert.

entry.title: SAP Stammtisch Melbourne May '24
entry.content:
The first Melbourne Stammtisch (regulars table) of 2024 had a great vibe and it was so good to get together and enjoy great food and conversation. The sentiment is to keep the good times rolling about every two months. More chances for more people to get along! This month is a great opportunity to coincide with the Mastering SAP conference. Please book it in to your diary.

We have a table booked at the Bank on Collins again, the food and beer was great and the atmosphere worked well for having a chat.

Thursday 23rd May 2024 at 5:30pm at The Bank on Collins 

 Ground floor/394 Collins St, Melbourne VIC 3000.

 

When you arrive, if you can't find us you can ask for a booking for the "SAP Regulars Table" 

Hope to see you there!

Ben.

entry.title: Re: SAP Stammtisch Melbourne May '24
entry.content: Cannot wait for this @BenPatterson, will be great to catch up with the SAP Community and talk about some key topics!! See you all then!

entry.title: S_ALR_87013611 Report Painter report to Internal Table
S_ALR_87013611 Report Painter report to Internal Table
entry.content:
Hi Guys,

  Im trying to run the standard report s_alr_87013611 in my abap program using submit to get the data in an internal table, but as a result the report is executed and data not returned. 

kindly review the attached code and suggest solutions

*&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
*& Report ZZ_COSTCENTER_3611
*&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
*&
*&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
REPORT ZZ_COSTCENTER_3611.

TABLES: CSKS, CSKA.

**SALV[
***********************************************************************
**   Global References for Classes                                    **
************************************************************************
 DATA: gr_table     TYPE REF TO cl_salv_table.
 DATA: gr_functions TYPE REF TO cl_salv_functions_list.
* DATA: gr_functions TYPE REF TO cl_salv_functions.
 DATA: gr_display   TYPE REF TO cl_salv_display_settings.
 DATA: gr_columns   TYPE REF TO cl_salv_columns_table.
 DATA: gr_column    TYPE REF TO cl_salv_column_table.
 DATA: gr_sorts     TYPE REF TO cl_salv_sorts.
 DATA: gr_agg       TYPE REF TO cl_salv_aggregations.
 DATA: gr_layout    TYPE REF TO cl_salv_layout.
 DATA: r_events TYPE REF TO cl_salv_events_table.
 DATA: rs_selfield TYPE slis_selfield.
 DATA: r_ucomm LIKE sy-ucomm.
 DATA: oref TYPE REF TO cx_root,
       text TYPE string.

************************************************************************
**   Data Declarations                                                **
************************************************************************
 DATA: it_spfli TYPE TABLE OF spfli.
 DATA: lv_key   TYPE salv_s_layout_key.

**get_layout[
 DATA:set_lay   TYPE slis_vari,
     g_exit    TYPE c,
     g_variant TYPE disvariant.
**get_layout]
**SALV]

** define data for SUBMIT Return
DATA: go_data TYPE REF TO data.

  FIELD-SYMBOLS: <gt_data> TYPE ANY TABLE.

SELECTION-SCREEN begin of BLOCK b1 WITH FRAME title text-000.  "Selection Values

*select-OPTIONS: s_ebeln for ekko-ebeln.
  PARAMETERS: pKOKRS TYPE KOKRS OBLIGATORY DEFAULT '1000',  "Company Code
            pGJAHR TYPE GJAHR OBLIGATORY ,                   " Fiscal Year
            pPERBL_F TYPE PERBL,                             " period low
            pPERBL_T TYPE PERBL,                           "period high
            pVERSN TYPE VERSN OBLIGATORY DEFAULT '0'.      "plan version

SELECTION-SCREEN END OF BLOCK b1.


SELECTION-SCREEN begin of BLOCK B2 WITH FRAME title text-001.   "Selection Group

PARAMETERS: pKSGRU TYPE KSGRU. "cost center Group
PARAMETERS: p_KOSTL TYPE CSKS-KOSTL NO-DISPLAY.
  SELECT-OPTIONS: so_kostl FOR p_kostl.

PARAMETERS: pKAGRU TYPE KAGRU  "Cost element group
               .

PARAMETERS: p_kstar TYPE CSKA-KSTAR NO-DISPLAY.
  SELECT-OPTIONS: so_kstar for p_kstar.

SELECTION-SCREEN END OF BLOCK B2.

START-OF-SELECTION.

      "Set SALV grid output parameters so the report executed in background
   cl_salv_bs_runtime_info=>set( EXPORTING display  = abap_false
                                        metadata = abap_false
                                        data     = abap_true ).

    SUBMIT GP4QLQKH46VZJ3P1A40A23S3HJG300
*      EXPORTING LIST TO MEMORY
          WITH $1KOKRE EQ pkokrs
          WITH $1GJAHR EQ pgjahr
          WITH $1PERIV EQ pperbl_f
          WITH $1PERIB EQ pperbl_t
          WITH $1VERP EQ pversn
          WITH $1KOSET EQ pksgru
          WITH _1KOSET IN so_kostl
          WITH $1KSTAR EQ pKAGRU
          WITH _1KSTAR IN so_kstar
    AND RETURN
    .
"Get data from s_alr_87013611
  TRY.
      cl_salv_bs_runtime_info=>get_data_ref(
        IMPORTING r_data = go_data ).
      ASSIGN go_data->* TO <gt_data>.

      "Keep FBL1N data into internal table
*      IF <gt_data> IS ASSIGNED.
*        LOOP AT <gt_data> ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<fs_data>).
*          MOVE-CORRESPONDING <fs_data> TO WA_FBL3N.
*          WA_FBL3N-source = 'FBL3N'.
*          APPEND WA_FBL3N TO IT_FBL3N.
*        ENDLOOP.
*      ENDIF.

    CATCH cx_salv_bs_sc_runtime_info ##NO_HANDLER.
      MESSAGE 'Unable to retrieve ALV data' TYPE 'E'.
  ENDTRY.

entry.title: Re: Does SAP Service&Support limit quota for raise servic...
entry.content:
This is usually not the case, as also the other answers to the referenced question show. In a direct support model with an s-user there is no quote or fee. 

If you have an indirect support model (you are supported by a VAR), then check with the VAR. 

In general you can check with your SAP Account Manager. But again, SAP does not charge for support cases and has no quota.

(However, the more issues you are able to solve with documentation, KBAs, wikis etc, the less cases SAP will receive and the faster the remaining cases will be processed 😉 ).

entry.title: What is the functionality of an Explicit trigger in Autflow in SAP Sales and Service Cloud V2
entry.content:
What is the functionality of an Explicit trigger in Autflow in SAP Sales and Service Cloud V2 also how to utilize custom buttons in the solution.

While creation of a button we have to mention the event name as well, how to utilize that?

entry.title: Re: Job Scheduler in SAP Business Technology Platform: Overview of Blog Posts
entry.content:
Hi @CarlosRoggan ,

So informative yet so easy to follow. My question is around how can we schedule BTP ABAP application via BTP Job Scheduler. 

  1. How to create binding between BTP ABAP application and XSUAA service
  2. How to implement oAuth authorization in the BTP Application and use it against XSUAA
  3. How to create binding between BTP ABAP application and BTP Job Scheduler

Any SAP help link or guide on the above will be very helpful. Also requesting @OlgaDolinskaja @CarineTchoutouo @Andre_Fischer to provide guidance on answering the above questions. 

Thanks,

Mainak

entry.title: Re: Importing View/Tables from Datasphere to SAC And crea...
entry.content:
Yes, you can consume the SAP Datasphere data in SAC via OData API to create a model (Analytical or Planning).

This blog explains how to:

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/using-the-datasphere-odata-api-with-sap-analytics-cloud/ba-p/13525315

Regards.

entry.title: SAP Gui Spricting Vba "Application.DisplayAlters = False"
entry.content:
I'm new to sap spricting. but i like the idea that i can automate tasks in sap using vba.

Unfortunately, I am now encountering a problem that I cannot solve. I would like to save a list from the cm02 query in excel.

Everything works fine up to the point where I want to save the excel file. The excelfile already exists and I have to confrim that I want to overwrite the excisting file. Normally I would suppress this message by setting application.displayAlerts = false at the beginning of the vba code. unfortunately, application is already defined as an object, otherwise I cannot call sap gui. if I set the code application.displayalters = false, I get an error message "Runtime error 424" - object required.

Below you can see me my code. Is there an other option to suppress the question for overwriting excel file?

Unfortunately I have no idea how to solve this problem. I would appreciate your help and suggestions.

Many thanks in advance.

Sub CM02()

Application.DisplayAlerts = False


Dim Application, SapGuiAuto As Object

If Not IsObject(Application) Then
   Set SapGuiAuto = GetObject("SAPGUI")
   Set Application = SapGuiAuto.GetScriptingEngine
End If
If Not IsObject(Connection) Then
   Set Connection = Application.Children(0)
End If
If Not IsObject(session) Then
   Set session = Connection.Children(0)
End If
If IsObject(WScript) Then
   WScript.ConnectObject session, "on"
   WScript.ConnectObject Application, "on"
End If


session.findById("wnd[0]").resizeWorkingPane 126, 39, False
session.findById("wnd[0]/tbar[0]/okcd").Text = "/ncm02"
session.findById("wnd[0]").sendVKey 0
session.findById("wnd[0]/mbar/menu[0]/menu[4]/menu[0]").Select
session.findById("wnd[1]/usr/ctxtRC65A-PROFIL_ID").Text = "Z13_B-730T"
session.findById("wnd[1]/usr/ctxtRC65A-PROFIL_ID").caretPosition = 10
session.findById("wnd[1]").sendVKey 0
session.findById("wnd[0]/mbar/menu[0]/menu[4]/menu[3]").Select
session.findById("wnd[1]/usr/ctxtRC65A-LISPROF_ID").Text = "ZPP_TEST"
session.findById("wnd[1]/usr/ctxtRC65A-LISPROF_ID").caretPosition = 8
session.findById("wnd[1]").sendVKey 0
session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/txt[35,3]").Text = "*"
session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/txt[35,7]").Text = "1300"
session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/txt[35,7]").SetFocus
session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/txt[35,7]").caretPosition = 4
session.findById("wnd[0]").sendVKey 0
session.findById("wnd[0]/tbar[1]/btn[6]").press
session.findById("wnd[1]/tbar[0]/btn[0]").press
session.findById("wnd[1]/tbar[0]/btn[0]").press
session.findById("wnd[1]/tbar[0]/btn[0]").press
session.findById("wnd[1]/tbar[0]/btn[0]").press


session.findById("wnd[0]").resizeWorkingPane 128, 39, False
session.findById("wnd[0]/mbar/menu[4]/menu[11]/menu[1]/menu[1]").Select
session.findById("wnd[1]/usr/subSUBSCREEN_STEPLOOP:SAPLSPO5:0150/sub:SAPLSPO5:0150/radSPOPLI-SELFLAG[0,0]").Select
session.findById("wnd[1]/usr/subSUBSCREEN_STEPLOOP:SAPLSPO5:0150/sub:SAPLSPO5:0150/radSPOPLI-SELFLAG[0,0]").SetFocus
session.findById("wnd[1]/tbar[0]/btn[0]").press
session.findById("wnd[1]/tbar[0]/btn[0]").press


  
  Windows("Tabelle von Basis (1)").Activate
    ActiveWorkbook.SaveAs Filename:="C:\Users\Cxxxx\Desktop\test.xlsx", _
        FileFormat:=xlOpenXMLWorkbook, CreateBackup:=False
    Windows("Tabelle von Basis (1)").Close



End Sub

entry.title: how to use distinct sql for projects

SELECT "Project","Project Name","Labor Budget","Labor Billed","Address1","period","year","month","Calculated_1" From REA

I want to only bring in the DISTINCT Project's so for example as of now it's showing 

 

ProjectProject NameLabor BilledLabor BudgetAddress1PeriodYearMonth

1

Elmers Ave

171100

2550

460 Madison Ave

201501

2015

1

1

Elmers Ave

171100

3000

460 Madison Ave

201601

2016

1

1

Elmers Ave

171100

3750

460 Madison Ave

201507

2015

7




I would only want to bring in 1 value for each project number. Is this possible?

ProjectProject NameLabor BilledLabor BudgetAddress1PeriodYearMonth

1

Elmers Ave

171100

2550

460 Madison Ave

201501

2015

1

entry.title: Installing SAPRouter on Linux: A Step-by-Step Guide
entry.content:
What is SAP Router ?

SAPRouter is a software component used to secure communication between SAP systems and the internet. Installing SAPRouter on Linux is a crucial step in ensuring secure communication for your SAP landscape. This step-by-step guide will walk you through the installation process.

Prerequisites:

- Linux server (e.g., CentOS, Ubuntu)

- Root access to the server

- SAPRouter software package downloaded from the SAP Support Portal

Step 1: Download SAPRouter:

Download the SAPRouter software package from the SAP Support Portal. Ensure that you download the correct version for your operating system.

Step 2: Extract the SAPRouter Package:

Transfer the downloaded SAPRouter package to your Linux server. Use the following command to extract the package:

tar -xvf saprouter_<version>_linux_x86_64.tar.gz

Step 3: Create a Directory for SAPRouter:

Create a directory to store the SAPRouter files. You can use the following command to create the directory:

mkdir /usr/sap/saprouter

Step 4: Copy SAPRouter Files:

Copy the extracted SAPRouter files to the newly created directory:

cp -R <path_to_extracted_files>/saprouter /usr/sap/saprouter

Step 5: Create a Configuration File:

Create a configuration file named `saprouter.ini` in the `/usr/sap/saprouter` directory. Here's a basic example of the configuration file:

# SAProuter Configuration File

version = 39

httpport = 81

tracefile = /usr/sap/saprouter/saprouter.trc

authid = *

permit = *

Step 6: Set Permissions:

Ensure that the SAPRouter binary and configuration files have the correct permissions:

chmod 755 /usr/sap/saprouter/saprouter

chmod 644 /usr/sap/saprouter/saprouter.ini

 

Step 7: Start SAPRouter:

Start the SAPRouter using the following command:

/usr/sap/saprouter/saprouter -r -R /usr/sap/saprouter/saprouter.ini

Step 8: Verify SAPRouter Status:

Verify that SAPRouter is running and listening on the specified port (e.g., 81):

netstat -tuln | grep 81

Step 9: Configure Firewall:

Configure your firewall to allow incoming and outgoing traffic on the SAPRouter port (e.g., 81) to ensure proper communication.

Step 10: Configure SAP Systems:

Update the `secinfo` file of your SAP systems to include the SAPRouter details for communication through the SAPRouter.

Overall information:

By following these steps, you can successfully install SAPRouter on your Linux server. This will help secure communication between your SAP systems and the internet, ensuring the integrity and confidentiality of your SAP landscape.

#SAP #SAPRouter #Linux #Installation SAP Young Thinkers #Red Hat Enterprise Linux SUSE Linux Enterprise Server SAP Women in Tech SAP Integration Suite SAP Business Application Studio @Muthumayandi @Subramanian @Sap @sapsapsap

Syntax Error- "ZTEST_COLLECTION" is unknown. ABAP objects and DDIC objects must be declared in the USING clause of the method. Local names must start with ":"

Can you guys please help in resolve issue.

entry.title: Re: Credit Check with API_SALES_ORDER_SRV
entry.content:
Hi Yuri,

I'm facing the same issue: I can pass the credit check when creating through the VA01 screen but not when using the API. Could you please share any insights or solutions you've found?

entry.title: ALV IDA no zero output setting ?
entry.content:
Hi Devs,

are You aware of ALV IDA ( cl_salv_gui_table_ida=>create_for_cds_view) configuration, which makes possible to hide zeros in the list ?

Displaying a list for a CDS View shows the initial values for dates and times.

I tried to go through all the interfaces, found nothing like NO_ZERO = 'X' which is possible in the good old ALV displays.
I would like to avoid an additional layer of CDS view with case statements and text column formatting to hide those zeros. Beside I would loose the built-in filtering possibility on those date type columns (or I need to keep both columns I'd like to avoid).

Thank You
Attila

entry.title: Re: WEBi Export broken with 4.3 SP4 PL200?
entry.content: Have you checked whether the PL400 fixes this error?

entry.title: Replacing values in SQL Query
entry.content:
All, 

This is my current query in SAP 

SELECT "Project","Project Name","Labor Budget","Labor Billed","Address1","period","year","month","EnergyType" From REA

I want to replace certain values inside the Energy Type column. For example I have rows like this 

ProjectProject NameLabor BilledLabor BudgetAddress1PeriodYearMonthEnergyType

1

Elmers Ave

171100

2550

460 Madison Ave

201501

2015

1

solar

1

Elmers Ave

171100

3000

460 Madison Ave

201601

2016

1

Solar

1

Elmers Ave

171100

3750

460 Madison Ave

201507

2015

7

solar
ProjectProject NameLabor BilledLabor BudgetAddress1PeriodYearMonthEnergyType

2

Avenue St

231100

2550

11 lee ave

201501

2015

1

Wind

2

Avenue St

231100

3000

12 lee ave

201601

2016

1

Wind (L)

2

Avenue St

231100

3750

13 lee ave

201507

2015

7

Wind (L)



I would like to replace underscore "solar" with capital "Solar" & replace "Wind (L)" with "Wind" Is this possible?

entry.title: Replacing values in SQL Query
entry.content:
All, 

This is my current query in SAP 

SELECT "Project","Project Name","Labor Budget","Labor Billed","Address1","period","year","month","EnergyType" From REA

I want to replace certain values inside the Energy Type column. For example I have rows like this 

ProjectProject NameLabor BilledLabor BudgetAddress1PeriodYearMonthEnergyType

1

Elmers Ave

171100

2550

460 Madison Ave

201501

2015

1

solar

1

Elmers Ave

171100

3000

460 Madison Ave

201601

2016

1

Solar

1

Elmers Ave

171100

3750

460 Madison Ave

201507

2015

7

solar
ProjectProject NameLabor BilledLabor BudgetAddress1PeriodYearMonthEnergyType

2

Avenue St

231100

2550

11 lee ave

201501

2015

1

Wind

2

Avenue St

231100

3000

12 lee ave

201601

2016

1

Wind (L)

2

Avenue St

231100

3750

13 lee ave

201507

2015

7

Wind (L)



I would like to replace underscore "solar" with capital "Solar" & replace "Wind (L)" with "Wind" Is this possible?

entry.title: Re: SAP Inside Track São Paulo 2024
entry.content:
Dear organizers,

Is there already a list of probably presentations to happen?

Thanks,

Daniel.

entry.title: SAP Basis Administration
entry.content:
Comprehensive Guide to the Key Responsibilities of a SAP Basis Administrator

Embarking on a career as a SAP Basis administrator opens up a world of responsibilities that are pivotal to the functioning of SAP systems.

This guide delves deep into the core tasks that define this role, providing beginners with a roadmap to navigate their way through the intricacies of SAP Basis administration.

Installation and Configuration: 

The first and foremost responsibility of a SAP Basis administrator is to install and configure SAP systems. This involves setting up servers, databases, and other components, and configuring them to work harmoniously. Installation and configuration are the building blocks upon which the entire SAP environment rests.

User Administration:

User administration is a critical aspect of SAP Basis administration. Basis administrators are tasked with creating and managing user accounts, assigning roles and authorizations, and ensuring that users have the necessary access to SAP functions based on their roles within the organization. Effective user administration is essential for maintaining system security and ensuring smooth operations.

System Monitoring:

System monitoring is an ongoing task that involves keeping a vigilant eye on the performance and health of SAP systems. This includes monitoring system resources such as memory, CPU usage, and disk space, as well as monitoring for any potential issues or errors that may arise. System monitoring is crucial for ensuring optimal performance and identifying and addressing issues before they escalate.

Transport Management:

Transport management is a key responsibility of a SAP Basis administrator. This involves managing the transport of changes, such as configuration settings or program developments, from one SAP system to another. The Transport Management System (TMS) is used to ensure that changes are moved in a controlled and consistent manner, maintaining system consistency and integrity.

Backup and Recovery:

Backup and recovery are indispensable components of SAP Basis administration. Basis administrators must regularly back up SAP systems to safeguard against data loss. In the event of a system failure, they must be able to swiftly recover the system and restore it to a working state. Backup and recovery procedures are essential for ensuring system availability and data integrity.

Being a SAP Basis administrator entails a multifaceted role that demands a combination of technical prowess, attention to detail, and proactive management.

By mastering these key responsibilities, you can navigate the complexities of SAP Basis administration and contribute significantly to the efficiency and stability of SAP systems.

Red Hat Enterprise Linux #SAP Basis Basis Technology 

Digital Technologies SAP TechEd High Tech SAP HANA Cloud, SAP Adaptive Server Enterprise

entry.title: Not able to do build apps its says FAILED with ERROR:
entry.content:
Runtime version: 4.9.260;
AB version: 2.3.0
COMMAND:

NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=16000 npxrnv export -p android -s standalone -c standalone --ci --yes --skipRnvCheck --packageManager yarn --template @sapappgyver/orchestra-template-standalone@4.9.260 -r

FAILED with ERROR:

Command failed with exit code 1: npx rnv export -p android -s standalone -c standalone --ci --yes --skipRnvCheck --packageManager yarn --template @sapappgyver/orchestra-template-standalone@4.9.260 -r

SAP Build Apps SAP Build

entry.title: Re: Business Intelligence Platform - RESTful Web Service...
entry.content:
The docs for creating users via the REST API are here: Creating New User | SAP Help Portal, but I assume you've already seen it.

What additional properties are you trying to manage?  The REST API provides only a subset of the capabilities of the Java SDK; if what you're trying to do isn't possible with the REST API, you might need to use Java (or .NET).

entry.title: Re: Replacing values in SQL Query
entry.content:
Hi,

 

what are you talking about? What is meant with "this is my query in SAP"? What are you using here? SAP offers a wide range of different products. Are you developing in ABAP? Are you using SAP SAC?

Here you see how you can update (this means changing certain rows in a data base table) in ABAP:

https://help.sap.com/doc/abapdocu_750_index_htm/7.50/en-US/abapupdate_source.htm

 

Best,

Edrilan Berisha

entry.title: Re: SAP Basis Administration
entry.content:
Hi,

 

this is the wrong section. You posted a question in the Q&A area.

 

Best,

Edrilan Berisha

entry.title: Re: Replacing values in SQL Query
entry.content:
Hi,

what is mean with SAP here? SAP offers a wide range of different products.

 

If you talk about ABAP you can do an update on the databse table as described in the documentation.

 

https://help.sap.com/doc/abapdocu_750_index_htm/7.50/en-US/abapupdate_source.htm

 

Best,

Edrilan Berisha

entry.title: Propose Items in Create Sales Order fiori app
entry.content:
Hi,

I would like to know if "Propose Items" in the Create Sales Order fiori app works?

I have setup the "Template for Item Proposal", and then setup the Customer Master Data setting the field values for "Item Proposal" and "PP Customer Procedure".  I thought (or believe) these are all i need to make use of the propose items functionality in the Sales Order.

When i open the fiori app to create a new sales order, select the sold-to party, go to items tab to select... I can see the field is active for "Propose Items".  If i click it, nothing happens, no table pop-up or anything like that that pulls the item proposal template. Item proposal is not working.

However, if i use the old "Create Sales Order -VA01", it works.

Question - is this an expected behaviour in the newer fiori app in Create Sales Order, that Propose Items function is not working?  Or perhaps am i missing a step or setup?

Regards,

Cathy

entry.title: SAP BTP BAS Error status 502 - getaddrinfo ENOTFOUND $(appname).cfapps.ap10.hana.ondemand.com
entry.content:
Referencing the tutorial: 

https://developers.sap.com/mission.btp-extend-sfsf-cap.html

I am getting the error (error_btp.png) while executing the application from 'HTML5 Applications' Menu from BTP cockpit.

Error Text:
HEAD request to /f1c211d8-644c-4808-9e48-929884cd1ccc.sfsf-projman-poc-e4dke1ry.sfsfprojmansfsfprojman-0.0.1/projman/ completed with status 502 error while forwarding request to https://$(appname).cfapps.ap10.hana.ondemand.com/projman/: getaddrinfo ENOTFOUND $(appname).cfapps.ap10.hana.ondemand.com correlation_id = c26d10e8-d3ed-4814-7e25-6df175343421

GET request to /f1c211d8-644c-4808-9e48-929884cd1ccc.sfsf-projman-poc-e4dke1ry.sfsfprojmansfsfprojman-0.0.1/projman/$metadata?sap-language=6N completed with status 502 error while forwarding request to https://$(appname).cfapps.ap10.hana.ondemand.com/projman/$metadata?sap-language=6N: getaddrinfo ENOTFOUND $(appname).cfapps.ap10.hana.ondemand.com correlation_id = f061c59f-79ec-4768-4807-c1201d30701d

There was no error in build and deploy.

Edit:

It was observed that host: ${appname} in mta.yaml was incorrectly maintained as host: $(appname) which is now corrected, and changes deployed to BTP but still facing the same issue. I suspect some cache is not being cleared.

Please suggest for the errors.

entry.title: S_PL0_86000030 and S_PL0_86000028 Reports Errors
entry.content:
Dear Friends,

T-code S_PL0_86000030 and S_PL0_86000028 and S_ALR_87012284 turns out to be totally different figures，And only the result of S_ALR_87012284 is correct，the result of S_PL0_86000030 and S_PL0_86000028 are wrong. I am in ECC version.

Please suggest, how to resolve the issue.

Regards
Sridhar

entry.title: Costing Run Error
entry.content:
Dear Friends,

I am working in ECC 6.0

In the costing run, T.code CK40N, User is informing us International Duty and freight is being displayed, which is wrong.

How to find this International Duty and freight in costing run? Why this cost is getting included, where it should not happen?

Please suggest.

Regards
Sridhar

entry.title: Re: SAP Tech Night Melbourne May 2024
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

The Tech night has been moved to June as it was conencides with the SAP Mastering event. The Tech night will now be on 13th June 2024.

entry.title: Re: BASIS- USER TİMES
entry.content:
Hi 

1. You can use the transaction code ST03 to find the user IDs executed list of transactions in the SAP system.   

2. To see the duration of login details you may have to enable the auditing log in SAP, refer to the SAP link 

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_HANA_PLATFORM/f157e7b47b2a417a99eadd4b6c433b77/dbc3f14e7fad48f9ac2ff95891ebd7d4.html

Regards

SS

entry.title: First SAP Tech Night Melbourne on 13th June 2024
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community, 

We are moving the SAP Tech night to June as the date concides with SAP Mastering Dates, we are organising a SAP Stammtisch event ( SAP Yarning Circle ) instead please find the details here 

sap-stammtisch-melbourne-may-24 

The AWS team are happy to host the SAP Melbourne Community Tech night at their Builder Studio, the first of its kind in the souther hemisphere. I am so excited to be able to organise and be part of this event. Please find below what our friends at AWS had to say

AWS welcomes the Melbourne SAP Tech Community to the AWS Builder Studio Melbourne, the first of its kind in the Southern Hemisphere. The AWS Builder Studio encompasses 350 square metres of showroom, collaboration space and workshop in the heart of downtown Melbourne on Collins Street. The centrepiece of the AWS Builder Studio is the Innovation Showroom where you have the opportunity to discover innovation in action with industry aligned demonstrators to spark ideas.

Further details : https://aws.amazon.com/local/australia/melbourne-builder-studio/

Location: AWS Builders Studio, L1, 555 Collins Street, Melbourne (Corner of King St and Collins St)

Date: Thursday 13th June, 5:30pm - 8pm

We will also have an "Innovation Showcase:AWS Builders Studio Tour" which will be organised  by our friends at AWS. 

Please register your interest with the below link, will help us with the count. 

https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-inside-track/first-sap-melbourne-tech-night-june-2024/ev-p/13677153

 

If you would like to present a one of the two remaining tech nights for 2024 please get intouch with us (sapsitmelbourne@gmail.com) 

Fun fact, did you know that the Global Running Day is on 5th June. We might be doing something on that day, details to follow soon. 

Cheers,

Sai

entry.title: Re: PCo and ERP only
entry.content: Hi Kevin, Thanks for the response. Could you please let me know where it is stated that if you ECC license then we can use Pco. Could you please refer to the document. Your agile response is highly appreciated. Regards,

entry.title: Re: Error of Posting Period while making AP invoice
entry.content: If you have a document opened (Not saved) in SAP and you have made a change in settings it is likely the open document will not get affects of that change so better to close and re-open the document.

entry.title: Re: sender error
entry.content: Sorry its difficult to understand the issue with the limited provided info. Please try to configure email without any encryption, if it works then explore encryption.

entry.title: Re: SAP Business One. Can I determine Last Evaluated Price?
entry.content:
Multiple UOMs would be a good option however since you have BOMs according to UOMs and happily using it lets stick to it as it is. 

When you disassemble a product, depending upon inventory valuation method SAP assigns cost to the components according to moving average unless you follow standard costing in for all products involved in disassembly.

entry.title: Re: Exchange rate update for existing transactions for fo...
entry.content: Please try to disassemeble the wrong production order and then redo a correct production order or simply adjust your inventory.

entry.title: Work center not displaying in MF50
entry.content:
Dear team 

In MF50, work center hierarchy as input and with only material with production check box tick one of the work center is not coming but when we uncheck only material with production then it's coming so our query is what data we can create so it appears with check box tick. Thanks.

 

BR

entry.title: Need groovy script for SAP CPI to loop through the nodes and add new node based on logic
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am new to groovy and learning basics. But got little complex requirement which I tried but couldn't get the desired requirement. So asking your help to achieve my requirement. Please help me to achieve below requirment.

I need to read xml message and from that take value of /User/User/CustomField_BookingHours which is currently -2 and sort all /User/User/TimeAccount/timeAccountDetails/TimeAccountDetail/bookingDate, oldest date should the top one then take value of first /User/User/TimeAccount/timeAccountDetails/TimeAccountDetail/bookingAmount and add both like 0.5 + (-2) then the balance is -1.5 and then take 2nd /User/User/TimeAccount/timeAccountDetails/TimeAccountDetail/bookingAmount which is 0.5 and add reslted balance which is -1.5, so the result is 0.5 + (-1.5) now new balance is -1.0 and then take 2nd /User/User/TimeAccount/timeAccountDetails/TimeAccountDetail/bookingAmount whoch is 3.0 and add reslted balance which is -1.0, so the result is 3.0 + (-1.0) now new balance is 2.0 which is greater than or eauql to 0, add the new node after 3rd TimeAccountDetail node, after which balanc value becomes >= 0, with field /User/User/TimeAccount/timeAccountDetails/TimeAccountDetail/bookingAmount value of /User/User/CustomField_BookingHours.

Excepting adding this new node, remaining payload should be as-is. Only add new node with /User/User/CustomField_BookingHours where ever it becomes >= 0 after adding to each /User/User/TimeAccount/timeAccountDetails/TimeAccountDetail/bookingAmount.

Sample payload 

<User>
<User>
<CustomField_BookingHours>-2</CustomField_BookingHours>
<bookingDate>2023-11-11T00:00:00.000</bookingDate>
<TimeAccount>
<timeAccountDetails>
<TimeAccountDetail>
<bookingAmount>0.5</bookingAmount>
<bookingDate>2022-01-14T00:00:00.000</bookingDate>
</TimeAccountDetail>
<TimeAccountDetail>
<bookingAmount>0.5</bookingAmount>
<bookingDate>2022-04-02T00:00:00.000</bookingDate>
</TimeAccountDetail>
<TimeAccountDetail>
<bookingAmount>3.0</bookingAmount>
<bookingDate>2023-02-27T00:00:00.000</bookingDate>
</TimeAccountDetail>
<TimeAccountDetail>
<bookingAmount>1.0</bookingAmount>
<bookingDate>2024-04-03T00:00:00.000</bookingDate>
</TimeAccountDetail>
</timeAccountDetails>
</TimeAccount>
</User>
</User>

The output should be

<User>
<User>
<CustomField_BookingHours>-2</CustomField_BookingHours>
<bookingDate>2023-11-11T00:00:00.000</bookingDate>
<TimeAccount>
<timeAccountDetails>
<TimeAccountDetail>
<bookingAmount>0.5</bookingAmount>
<bookingDate>2022-01-14T00:00:00.000</bookingDate>
</TimeAccountDetail>
<TimeAccountDetail>
<bookingAmount>0.5</bookingAmount>
<bookingDate>2022-04-02T00:00:00.000</bookingDate>
</TimeAccountDetail>
<TimeAccountDetail>
<bookingAmount>3.0</bookingAmount>
<bookingDate>2023-02-27T00:00:00.000</bookingDate>
</TimeAccountDetail>
<TimeAccountDetail>
<bookingAmount>-2</bookingAmount>
<bookingDate>2023-11-11T00:00:00.000</bookingDate>
</TimeAccountDetail>
<TimeAccountDetail>
<bookingAmount>1.0</bookingAmount>
<bookingDate>2024-04-03T00:00:00.000</bookingDate>
</TimeAccountDetail>
</timeAccountDetails>
</TimeAccount>
</User>
</User>

entry.title: Function module CNV_PE_S4_RFCFM_ORG_DERIV missing?
entry.content:
Hi,

my collegue is configuring a migration project on our S/4H 2022 onPremise server.

Migration ApproachMigrate Data Directly from SAP System
ScenarioSAP ERP to SAP S/4HANA
Connection to Source System<RFC connection to ERP6.0 EHP8 with IDES>

The process stops with an error message (see attachment) after clicking "create project". There is an error with no detail regarding the function module CNV_PE_S4_RFCFM_ORG_DERIV. This function module does only exist on the S/4H system, but not on the ERP system. Do we have to install something on the ERP system?

Best Regards,

Christian

entry.title: Error : Consolidation group is not defined for storage bin xx xxx xx
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I am working on deconsolidation scenario with rule based config in embedded S4 system.

I have done the below setup :

1. In POSC steps defined - Unload, deconsolidation ,put away (deconsolidation step marked for rule based config.)

2. Activity area updated with consolidation group

3. Max no of warehouse tasks for deconsolidation = 3 and in Specify Deconsolidation Station work center is updated.

4. Number range assigned to consolidation groups.

Bin sorting done.

Now i have created inbound delivery with 5 products in single HU. When I try to unload i am getting error consolidation group not defined for storage bin. I found table /SCWM/LAGPS is blank. 

Please help with your inputs.

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: SAP NW AS ABAP 7.50 SP2 – Developer Edition to Download: Concise Installation Guide
entry.content:
For those who have issues with the developer key please check this important information in readme.html file(located in the directory where you unrar all the installation files)

To get a license:

    1. Start the SAP system
      1. Switch to user npladm in the console : $ su - npladm
      2. In SAPLogon, start the SAP system : $ startsap
      3. Log on to the system with client 000 and user SAP* (see table with SAP users below). Open transaction SLICENSE to ascertain your hardware key. Alternatively, you can get your hardware key by executing $ /usr/sap/NPL/SYS/exe/run/saplicense -get.
      4. Request the license key for your test-drive version SAP License Keys for Preview, Evaluation, and Developer Versions. You can also generate a new key for your ASE database if the existing key expires.
        1. Select NPL - SAP NetWeaver 7.x (Sybase ASE) as System ID
        2. Enter your personal data, agree to the License Agreement, and choose Generate.
        3. The website automatically generates a .txt file for this system/key. Download and save this file.
        4. In SLICENSE, install the license file as follows: In the tab Digitally signed licenses, delete the existing license, then choose Install.
        5. The developer access key for user DEVELOPER and installation number DEMOSYSTEM is already in the system and you can start developing in the customer name range (Z*, Y*).
          Please note that all the above steps must be carried out; otherwise, the prepared user key will not work.

          Its very very important that you name your program or class with Z or Y at the begging otherwise it won't work!

entry.title: Re: Trx KKPHIE: assigning single objects to cost objects hierarchy through BDC
entry.content: Hi SAP expert, is it possible to offer more detail steps about how KKP2 substitute KKPHIE and which T-code can replace KKPY and OKZ5 in HANA. Thanks.

entry.title: I want add my payment information in SAP, but there is no 401261(hsbc)
entry.content: I want add my payment information in SAP APP, but there is no the sort code 401261(hsbc)

entry.title: Re: May Developer Challenge - SAP AI Services - Week 2
entry.content: @xavisanse As always with AI models, it depends on the document and the use case but the more documents you assign to your template with perfect extraction results the better 🙂 Also recipes are a particular difficult case as the layout can have immense differences!

entry.title: Re: Trying to understand the behaviour of intent lock in...
entry.content:
Answering to my own questions after discussing with SAP PS and testing,

1. Table will not be locked compltely when there is an intent lock (Ex or Sh) on a table.
    Reason : In a way, an intent lock does not really lock anything. The mechanism is more of a 'secondary'          lock, as there is already a shared or exclusive page or row lock and the intent lock is a resutl of that. It is a      synchronisation locking type to accomodate concurrency and avoid unnecessary blocking. An INTENT            lock does not lock the table itself but it does prevent conflicting table locks to be taken out.
2. SPID 109 will be entertained and not blocked.
    Reason : Yes, an Ex_intent lock will be held and it does apply to the entire table but it does not lock the      table. Thus the select query is allowed to read and incase if it is blocked could be due to other factors like      isolation level.

References:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ASE/a08646e0736e4b4b968705079db4c5f5/a8e7fa0cbc2b101497b1ed80d79f2e58.html?locale=en-US
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ASE/a08646e0736e4b4b968705079db4c5f5/a8e95e69bc2b1014b47d8df722675c67.html?locale=en-US
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ASE/a08646e0736e4b4b968705079db4c5f5/a8ea9a48bc2b1014bf9d8565f3cd6823.html?locale=en-US
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ASE/a08646e0736e4b4b968705079db4c5f5/a8eb04a3bc2b1014bef8884d8400b0ab.html?locale=en-US
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ASE/a08646e0736e4b4b968705079db4c5f5/a8eb90a9bc2b1014a4f8b558fa208f90.html?locale=en-US
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ASE/a08646e0736e4b4b968705079db4c5f5/a8eb640fbc2b10148a3da909d0e6b37f.html?locale=en-US
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ASE/a7b3e46335184f5caf70a08c91c540f3/a97b70b4bc2b1014af8dcd7ce8a74e26.html?locale=en-US

PS: Thanks to Bart for the clarification.

Regards,
Dilip Voora

entry.title: issue with text datatype storage
entry.content:
Dears, kindly help in this issue,

recently I noted that our database has some tables with columns of text datatype, but some of those tables has 0 rows, so I am wondering if I change datatype for those columns to varchar, so:

1- to what length can I set varchar (in our database Character Set = 2, cp850)

2- what is the benefits can I get by this changing?

for one of those tables let's say table T1, which has  a TEXT column, 

I run:

sp_spaceused T1,1

I got the result:

index_namesizereservedunused
tT115824 KB16672 KB848 KB
rowtotalreserveddataindex_size unused
65917352 KB424 KB15864 KB1040 KB

How index size has this value? I supposed that text datatype reserved a data page size foe each row and  @@maxpagesize in ours is 8 kb, so I multiplied 8 * 659 but I got a different value from the index size in the table above, also I checked  the default @@texttype in ours, and it is 32 kb, even if I multiple 32 * 659 I'll  get a different value,

could you please explain how index size is calculated?

kindly note that table has 659 rows but the text column is empty,

so, I run select datalength for that column I get 1 byte for each row?

still wondering how the index has 15864 KB value?

Regards

entry.title: TableOrder API - ERROR_CODE_SELF_ORDER_INVALID_ITEM_PRICE
entry.content:
Hi team,
We are trying to create a tableorder from API. We have the bellow JSON which we found in swagger.
When we send it without unitPrice, the order is created.
When we need to use the unitPrice, we always receive the error message: ERROR_CODE_SELF_ORDER_INVALID_ITEM_PRICE
We flagged the product Force manual price entry = True but same error.

Any suggestions? 

 

{
    "tableId": "2",
    "tableAreaId": "Default",
    "comment": "24",
    "items": [
        {
            "id": "10001",
            "quantity": 2.0,
            "unitPrice": 1.1,
            "comment": ""
        }
    ],
    "genericReplacements": []
}

entry.title: Re: How to create the cds entity Vector column in CAP?
entry.content: When I try to do mbt build, it reminds me "Type “cds.Vector” is not supported for OData", how can I avoid using Odata interface of Vector directly?

entry.title: Re: Students can get SAP-Certified for Free - Here is the Why and How
entry.content:
Hello everyone, Hello dear SAP team,

first of all thank you for the student offer CERS01 for 1 certification attempt.

Unfortunately, I was not able to find the student-offer for 6 certification attempts. Could you please post the link here.

In case this is not available (yet 😘😞 

I understand that it can be a hefty sum for a student to put in 500 € at once (although it has a much better value than the student discount (125€/1ea for CERS01 vs. ~83€/1ea for CER006).

But how about this something like the following idea: for each successful student certification attempt, we students receive an individual discount for the purchase of the next CERS01, so that for example after the 5th purchase of CERS01 end up with an average price around 75.- to 80.-€ ???

 

With kind regards,

Pierre

entry.title: Posting period 010 is not defined for fiscal year variantMessage No. GU506
entry.content:
hi team

greetings!!

 

Posting period 010 is not defined for fiscal year variant R4 how to solve this error

regards

Aswanth

entry.title: Re: Replacing values in SQL Query
entry.content:
Greetings Adam...

A suggestion for you.  When you post that you have SQL which needs to be changed, I would suggest you include a copy of that SQL with your posting.  You will get many more replies and alternatives to your requirements.

There are actually three ways this can be done.

1.  IF those Energy Type Names are on a table, you can change the Name there.  Most tables have both a Value and a Description.

2.  You can use a "CASE" Statement inside your SQL.  Without your actual SQL, I cannot give you the definitive answer.  But the following is just an example of how CASE works.  You would need to adapt it with two "WHEN" clauses:

CASE WHEN T0."EnergyType" = 'Wind (L)" THEN 'Wind' ELSE T0."EnergyType" END AS "Energy Type".

Take a look here to get more information - https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-members/sap-business-one-using-case-in-sap-b1-sql-top-ten-cases/ba-p/13411167

3.  You might be able to use DTW (Data Transfer Workbench) to update current and historical data.

Best Regards - Zal

entry.title: Method to automate Change of Storage location in Process order
entry.content:
Hello Gurus,

Please guide me how to automate the process of Changing of Storage location in Process order after certain bussines transaction.

Primarliy this to change the reservation from the Store sloc to Shopfloor Sloc.

I beilve LSMW and BDC will not be good idea.

Please help SAP S/4HANA Industrial Manufacturing

entry.title: Quiz template - how to delete quiz templates
entry.content:
Hi guys

Our team have been practising building their own quiz templates (book pages). How do I delete the templates we no longer need? 

 For example,  in the Template drop down menu of the quiz question component (multiple choice as an example) we can see all the test templates we created. How can I delete all our test practice quiz templates?

entry.title: Re: How to set BOM when splitting material codes from dif...
entry.content: Thank you, expert. Do you mean to add another code for materials supplied by the same supplier? For example, Supplier A with material code 1001A, code 1001 in region 1, and use 1001A in region 2. If the same supplier supplies, adding different material codes will also increase management complexity. We have also considered using FFF materials, but can there be a good solution for the following special situations? If we add another area, When selling to region 3, supplier A with material code 1001A or supplier B with material code 1001B can be used, with priority given to A.

entry.title: Re: May Developer Challenge - SAP AI Services
entry.content: In my case, the same thing happened as with @Alpesa1990 . I have entered a recipe in Spanish and the service doesn't differentiate well between the ingredient and the quantity.

entry.title: GUI oddities with new 2022 ABAP Trial
entry.content:
Setting up the new trial version, I ran into a few weird issues:

  1. I can no longer paste the username/password combination from the notes area in the gui: if I do that, I get a password error... I must copypaste username and password separately, whereas until 1909 that was possible.
  2. attempting to paste the standalone version of abapGit into the SE38 edit windows leads to a crash so severe that the GUI vanishes completely, even the connection list is gone. This happens with the latest version:
  3. even simply highlighting the current code of abapgit, then hitting DEL leads to the same crash. Note that Eclipse/ADT do not have this issue.

Has anyone encountered them too?

entry.title: Re: 🇮🇳 SAP CodeJam ABAP: SAP BTP, ABAP Environment & RAP
entry.content:
Hello all,
So had a query like i am constantly getting this below error no matter how many times i install the latest version of eclipse and ADT

ERROR - You were successfully authenticated, but an error occurred during the Service Instance logon. Please ensure that you have a user for the Service Instance.

Any help to resolve above error would be really great.

Thanks.

entry.title: Attendance and Absence Report with LATE IN and EARLY OUT
entry.content:
Hi All,

 

We have a requirement for Attendance and Absence Report along with Late IN and Early OUT. 

Basically it should be like a Day-wise report next to each calendar date with each day showing 

1> Clock IN

2> Clock OUT

3> Absence

4> Late IN

5> Early OUT

6> NO Attendance/Absence (on a working Day)

 

Currently we have built a report which shows Clock IN and OUT, Absence. 

We referred to the below blog as well which explains about the same. 

https://community.sap.com/t5/product-and-customer-updates/new-reporting-capabilities-for-absences-and-attendances-in-sap/ba-p/13652610

 

How to get Late IN and Early OUT in the same report?

We are deriving Late IN and Early OUT as Valuation Results. Not able to merge the Valuation Results in the Attendance and Absence Report. 

 

Any input if this is possible would be appreciated.

entry.title: Re: Error in trial ABAP Cloud Project Creation
entry.content: Hey, could you please tell in more detail as i couldn't find authorization button.

entry.title: Re: May Developer Challenge - SAP AI Services - Week 2
entry.content:

I'm getting the same result as when using the DoX UI

entry.title: Insights on SAP vs Oracle
entry.content:
I'm working on a new project for a large corporation (manufacturing and distribution) to evaluate potential ERP solutions. I’m new to this topic and I was asked by my manager to help get it started.

I've been looking at all sorts of research and I'm eager to gain real-world perspectives from experienced professionals in the field.

Specifically, I'm interested in your insights on SAP and Oracle:

  • What are the advantages and disadvantages encountered with SAP and Oracle in large-scale deployments? 
  • Are there particular functionalities where one performs better over the other?
  • Cost is a major factor. Can anyone share experiences regarding implementation timelines and ongoing maintenance expenses for both?

What other questions should I be asking? 

Thanks in advance for sharing your valuable knowledge!

Noa

entry.title: Re: Stock category BB to FF via Create Posting Change App...

Hi,

Can you check open warehouse tasks ?

entry.title: Re: Show License Information at Startup
entry.content:
Dear @PrageethMP , 

I'm afraid this functionality is not supported by Browser Access. For additional information, you may refer to this blog: https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/sap-business-one-the-future-of-browser-access/ba-p/13406090 

Regards,

Maya

entry.title: Re: RE-FX - Deactivation of ROU Assets
entry.content:
Hi, Jyothi, 

The sentence "...System will ignore the contracts/ROU Assets even if any one of this criteria is met." was a mistake?

I doubt if it should be "...System will ignore the contracts/ROU Assets even if any one of this criteria is NOT met." Am I right？

Linux Gao.
